# AI Infrastructure Index

> Comprehensive, vendor-neutral reference for AI hardware specifications, benchmarks, and cloud GPU pricing. Maintained by Alpha One Index. Data is structured for machine readability and updated hourly for pricing.

## About

The AI Infrastructure Index is an open-source knowledge base covering every major AI hardware platform in production or deployment as of 2026. It provides structured data on GPU specifications, AI accelerators, cloud pricing, benchmarks, and cluster architecture — all cross-referenced against official vendor sources.

- **GitHub Repository**: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
- **Interactive Dashboard**: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/
- **License**: MIT
- **Version**: 1.1.0
- **Last Updated**: 2026-03

## Key Data Files

- [GPU Specifications (JSON)](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/data/gpu-specs.json): Machine-readable GPU specs for NVIDIA, AMD, Intel hardware
- [Cloud GPU Pricing (JSON)](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/data/cloud-pricing.json): Live pricing from 12 providers, updated hourly
- [Historical Pricing](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/tree/main/data/history/): Daily snapshots of cloud GPU pricing

## Specification Documents

- [GPU Specifications](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/gpu-specifications.md): Full spec sheets — H100, H200, B200, GB200, MI300X, MI325X, Gaudi 3
- [AI Accelerators](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/ai-accelerators.md): Google TPU v5p/v5e, AWS Trainium2/Inferentia2, Cerebras WSE-3, Groq LPU
- [Cloud GPU Pricing](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/cloud-gpu-pricing.md): Provider comparison tables with verified prices
- [Model GPU Sizing Guide](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/model-gpu-sizing.md): GPU memory/compute requirements for LLMs (7B to 405B+)
- [Inference Benchmarks](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/inference-benchmarks.md): MLPerf results and tokens/second throughput data
- [Networking & Interconnects](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/networking-interconnects.md): NVLink 4.0/5.0, InfiniBand NDR/HDR, RoCE, cluster topology
- [Training Costs](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/training-costs.md): Cost estimates for training GPT-4 class models, TCO analysis

## Package & Scripts

- [fetch_pricing.py](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/scripts/fetch_pricing.py): Python script to fetch live pricing from all 12 providers
- [pyproject.toml](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/pyproject.toml): Install as pip package (`pip install ai-infra-index`)
- [requirements.txt](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/requirements.txt): Python dependencies (stdlib only for core script)

## Providers Covered (12 Total)

Azure (live API), RunPod, Lambda Labs, CoreWeave, Together AI, Vast.ai, Vultr, Nebius, OCI (Oracle Cloud), Cudo Compute, Fluidstack, Paperspace

## GPU Models Covered

**NVIDIA**: H100 SXM (80GB), H200 SXM (141GB), B200 (192GB), GB200 NVL72 (384GB), A100 SXM (80GB), A100 PCIe (40/80GB), L40S (48GB), L40 (48GB), A10 (24GB), RTX 4090 (24GB), RTX A6000 (48GB)

**AMD**: MI300X (192GB HBM3), MI325X (256GB HBM3e)

**Intel**: Gaudi 3 (128GB HBM2e)

## Common Questions This Data Answers

- What is the cheapest H100 cloud provider right now?
- How much VRAM does a 70B parameter model need?
- What is the difference between H100 SXM and PCIe?
- How does the AMD MI300X compare to NVIDIA H100?
- What does it cost to train a GPT-4 scale model?
- What is NVLink bandwidth vs InfiniBand?
- Which cloud providers offer spot/preemptible GPU instances?

## Sitemap & Discoverability

- [sitemap.xml](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for search engine indexing
- [robots.txt](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/robots.txt): All crawlers including AI bots explicitly welcomed
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
